description: Design and implementation of specialized systems for smooth logistics management, working in agile environments.
Working with REST APIs built with Nest.js, integrating frontend applications with backend services to support business requirements.
Enablement of reliable integrations and efficient communication between services within cross-functional teams.
Optimization of workflows to improve operational efficiency and resource utilization through continuous feedback and improvements.
Application of software architecture best practices to ensure maintainability and long-term scalability.
Led frontend architecture and technical direction of the company's website and internal platforms, integrating with backend services built in Nest.js.
Defined the frontend technology stack, project structure, and development tools (linting, formatting, build processes), ensuring smooth integration with REST APIs built with Nest.js.

Coordinated development workflows, performed pull request reviews, and mentored the team, promoting best practices for scalability, performance, and efficient data handling between frontend and backend.
Worked closely with stakeholders to translate business requirements into frontend solutions, integrating with backend APIs built with Nest.js.
Implementation of responsive and accessible user interfaces using modern frontend frameworks.
Integration of third-party services and APIs in customer-oriented applications.
Collaboration in agile environments alongside designers, backend developers, and product teams.
Contribution to internal tools and shared components to accelerate development across projects.
